description: Client pledge of electronically settled listed equities on controlled broker accounts, covering pledgee setup, pledge deposit and withdrawal, CSD reporting, and corporate action treatment

actors.name: Client (Pledgor)
actors.description: Beneficial owner of the equities whose holdings are pledged as security

actors.name: Pledgee (Bank or Counterparty)
actors.description: Party to whom the equities are pledged, typically a bank

actors.name: Broker Back-Office Operator
actors.description: Captures pledge deposit and withdrawal transactions on behalf of the client

actors.name: Broker Supervisor
actors.description: Authorises pledge movements and advice-note release

actors.name: Central Securities Depository Participant
actors.description: Receives pledge movement and position reports from the broker

transitions.description: Pledge confirmed, reference number allocated, advice note generated
Further partial withdrawal returns to active residual pledge

eligibility.electronic_settlement_only: Only electronically settled equities qualify; paper-settled or unlisted instruments must be pledged outside the system
eligibility.controlled_account_only: Pledgor account must be a controlled client account of eligible account type
eligibility.availability_calculation: Available quantity = holding minus unsettled sales minus borrowing or collateral minus already pledged

data_integrity.pledge_quantity_cap: Pledge quantity must not exceed available quantity for the instrument on the account
data_integrity.reference_uniqueness: Each confirmed pledge receives a system-generated unique reference number used for all subsequent withdrawals
data_integrity.pledgee_identification: Pledgee name is mandatory; bank code and branch optional but auto-populate pledgee name when provided
data_integrity.reason_length: Reason field supports up to fifty characters; any entry is recorded against the transaction

workflow.confirmation_required: No pledge or withdrawal is persisted until the update flag is explicitly confirmed by the operator
workflow.global_update_exclusivity: Global update (all extracted) and line-level quantity selection are mutually exclusive on a single capture
workflow.withdrawal_by_reference: Withdrawals must be matched against an existing pledge reference number and cannot exceed residual pledged quantity

segregation.pledged_not_available_for_settlement: Pledged holdings are excluded from availability calculations for sale settlement
segregation.statement_disclosure: Client statements must clearly reflect securities that are pledged versus unpledged
segregation.portfolio_consolidation: For valuation and beneficiary disclosure, pledged and unpledged holdings consolidate into a single holding line

corporate_actions.action_on_client_account: Corporate action processing occurs on the underlying client account, never on the pledgee
corporate_actions.no_pledgee_impact: Pledgee entitlements are unaffected by corporate actions on pledged securities

reporting.advice_note_on_confirmation: A pledge advice note is generated and released to the pledgee immediately upon confirmation of a deposit or withdrawal
reporting.csd_movement_report: An intraday movement report of all pledge deposits and withdrawals is produced for submission to the broker CSD participant
reporting.csd_position_report: An intraday position report of all client pledge positions is produced for submission to the broker CSD participant
reporting.audit_trail: Every pledge transaction is queryable by account, instrument, date range, pledgee, branch, and reference number

security.segregation_of_duties: Pledge confirmation and advice-note release are restricted to supervisor role
security.personal_data_protection: Pledgor identifying data on advice notes must be handled per POPIA lawful basis requirements

errors.message: Only electronically settled listed equities may be pledged through this function
Account is not a controlled client account of an eligible type
Pledge quantity exceeds available quantity after unsettled sales, borrowing, and existing pledges
Pledge reference number does not exist for the specified account and instrument
Withdrawal quantity exceeds residual pledged quantity for this reference
Pledge capture not confirmed; update flag must be set explicitly before persistence
Pledgee name is mandatory when the pledgee is not a registered bank
Global update and per-line quantity selection cannot be used on the same capture
Pledge confirmation requires a supervisor role

capture_pledge_deposit.description: Operator captures a pledge deposit of available listed equities against a pledgee

confirm_pledge_and_issue_reference.description: Supervisor confirms the pledge, system allocates a reference number and generates an advice note

reject_pledge_exceeding_availability.description: Prevent pledge quantities that exceed availability after unsettled sales, borrowing, and existing pledges

reject_ineligible_instrument.description: Block pledge attempts on instruments that are not electronically settled listed equities

withdraw_pledge_by_reference.description: Operator withdraws all or part of a previously confirmed pledge against its reference number

release_pledge_fully.description: Full outstanding pledged quantity is withdrawn and the pledge reaches terminal released state

report_movements_to_csd.description: Intraday movement report of pledge deposits and withdrawals is produced for the broker CSD participant

report_positions_to_csd.description: Intraday position report of outstanding client pledges is produced for the broker CSD participant

process_corporate_action_on_client_accou.description: Corporate action on a pledged instrument is processed against the pledgor client account and does not affect the pledgee

exclude_pledged_from_settlement_availabi.description: Pledged holdings are excluded from availability used by settlement and sale matching

anti_patterns.rule: Do not allow pledged quantities to remain in settlement availability calculations
anti_patterns.why: Double-counting pledged scrip for sale settlement has historically caused failed trades and forced buy-ins

anti_patterns.rule: Do not process corporate action entitlements on the pledgee
anti_patterns.why: The pledgee is a security holder of record only as collateral; entitlements belong to the beneficial owner on the client account

anti_patterns.rule: Do not confirm pledges without an explicit update flag
anti_patterns.why: Silent persistence of partial captures has caused incorrect advice notes to be sent to pledgees

anti_patterns.rule: Do not reuse pledge reference numbers across deposits and withdrawals
anti_patterns.why: Reference reuse breaks the audit trail and prevents reconciliation against CSD movement reports

anti_patterns.rule: Do not send advice notes containing personal identifying information over unencrypted channels
anti_patterns.why: POPIA s.19 requires appropriate technical safeguards for transmission of personal information

anti_patterns.rule: Do not permit pledge capture on non-controlled or ineligible account types
anti_patterns.why: Pledges on proprietary or suspense accounts mis-state client collateral positions and violate segregation rules

anti_patterns.rule: Do not allow a single user to both capture and confirm a pledge
anti_patterns.why: Segregation-of-duties is required to prevent unauthorised pledging of client scrip

reports.CPADV: Client pledge advice note to pledgee
reports.PCPMOV: Client pledge movement report to CSD participant
reports.PCPPOS: Client pledge position report to CSD participant

dissemination.portfolio_layout: Holdings record layout extended with pledge quantity and sign indicator
